programme.desc: Based on the bombshell New York Times investigation, two reporters race to expose a Hollywood scandal and shatter a corrupt system by empowering courageous women to speak out.

programme.title: In The Name Of The Father
programme.desc: Based on the Guildford Four who were wrongly convicted of a deadly IRA bombing in 1974. Daniel Day-Lewis gives an impassioned performance as an innocent victim of shocking injustice.

programme.title: Blackhat
programme.desc: After a nuclear plant is hacked by unknown culprits, an FBI agent joins forces with a convicted hacker and the Chinese in an effort to bring down the criminals.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Jason Bourne is racing to solve the mystery of his past while being hunted by the very organisation that hired him.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: A couple plan to foster one child, but end up taking in three siblings instead. As they face the challenges of parenthood, they must learn quickly what it takes to build a loving and unexpected family.

programme.title: Father Stu
programme.desc: After surviving a motorcycle accident, a former boxer and long-time agnostic, Stuart Long, starts to wonder if he can find his purpose and use his second chance to help others.

programme.title: She Said
programme.desc: Based on the bombshell New York Times investigation, two reporters race to expose a Hollywood scandal and shatter a corrupt system by empowering courageous women to speak out.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: No Remorse
programme.desc: Jesse, having been suspended by the local town council, moonlights for his friend, State Homicide Commander Healy by investigating a series of murders in Boston.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Innocents Lost
programme.desc: After his involuntary retirement, Jesse Stone investigates the suspicious death of a young friend while the Paradise police force deals with the arrogant new chief, who is the son-in-law of a town councilman.

programme.title: The Interpreter
programme.desc: A UN interpreter overhears an assassination plot. When a Secret Service agent delves into the case, he begins to question whether she is a victim, or a suspect.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: A charismatic and elusive bank robber marked by the FBI as America's first Public Enemy No.1 is hunted relentlessly by top FBI agents.

programme.title: Where The Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: Kya, an abandoned girl who raised herself in dangerous marshlands, opens herself to a new world when she is drawn to two young men from town. When one is found dead, she is cast as the main suspect.

programme.title: Sacramento
programme.desc: Free-spirited Rickey, clinging to his Peter Pan ways, convinces his settled friend Glenn to pause domestic life for an unplanned road trip across California.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Oakland A’s general manager Billy Beane attempts to build a competitive baseball team on a tight budget, using computer-driven analysis to recruit undervalued players and challenge the traditional way the game is run.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: The Royal Hotel
programme.desc: Backpackers Hanna and Liv take a job in a remote Australian pub to earn some extra cash and are confronted by a bunch of unruly locals and a situation that quickly spirals out of their control.

programme.title: The Boxer
programme.desc: After being in prison for his involvement with the IRA, Danny Flynn re-opens a boxing ring in effort to heal his Belfast community, finding that a legacy of violence is not easily escaped.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Batteries Not Included
programme.desc: An elderly couple, an ex boxer, an artist and a pregnant woman don't want to leave their rundown tenement. When the tenants help two spaceships seeking a power source, the aliens return the favour.

programme.title: Harry And The Hendersons
programme.desc: An all-American dad who runs over Big Foot in the family station wagon, unwittingly opening up his home and his heart to a smelly monster that gives the family a few lessons in being human.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two men get laid off and have to become stay-at-home dads when they can't find jobs. This inspires them to open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: A couple plan to foster one child, but end up taking in three siblings instead. As they face the challenges of parenthood, they must learn quickly what it takes to build a loving and unexpected family.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Dragonheart
programme.desc: Long ago, when majestic fire-breathers soared through the skies, there lived a knight who would come face-to-face and heart-to-heart with the most remarkable creature that ever existed.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover, a travelling circus.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: The Templeton brothers have become adults and drifted away from each other, but a new boss baby with a cutting-edge approach is about to bring them together again - and inspire a new family business.

programme.title: Curious George
programme.desc: George, the inquisitive little monkey with an insatiable taste for adventure, sets off in a brand new tale where his spunky and fun-loving nature launches him on a series of adventures.

programme.title: Lyle, Lyle, Crocodile
programme.desc: When the Primm family moves to New York City, their young son Josh struggles to adapt to his new school and new friends. All of that changes when he discovers Lyle, a singing crocodile living in their attic.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: After an aptitude test mix-up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. An evil executive then plots to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A loyal police dog and his human officer are injured on the job. A risky operation saves them by combining them into one hybrid officer. He tries to adapt to his new identity while stopping the evil cat Petter’s plans.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: Gabby's prized dollhouse falls into the hands of eccentric cat lady Vera, sending her on a real-world quest to reunite the Gabby Cats before time runs out.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: After discovering an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new types of dragons, Hiccup and Toothless find themselves at the centre of a battle to prevent a costly war across their land.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: The Bad Guys try to settle into life as Good Guys, but when an all-female criminal squad drags them out of retirement for one last job, trust and loyalty are put to the test.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy neighbourhood with picket fences and rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. In the cellar is a hideout where a dastardly villain is plotting a huge heist - he wants to steal the moon!

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Alex the Lion is the king of the urban jungle as the main attraction at New York's Central Park Zoo. He and his best friends Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo have lived their entire lives in blissful captivity.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A young bee leaves the hive to explore the world, but when he breaks the rules and talks to humans, it triggers a series of events that change both worlds.

programme.title: Curious George 6: Cape Ahoy
programme.desc: With help from a local fisherman, his niece and an adorable baby seal, George embarks on a quest in search of the long-lost shipwreck of legendary sea captain Trumpet Tooter.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Emma Thompson is wonderfully hideous as a mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite reformed super-villain Gru returns for more adventures with Lucy, their daughters, and the lovably zany minions.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria find themselves in Africa, where Alex meets his long-lost parents. Meanwhile, Makunga, his father's rival, will stop at nothing to be the king of the jungle.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: Oscar is a fast-talking little fish whose big dreams have a habit of landing him in hot water. Lenny is a great white shark with a sensitive side and a secret: he's a vegetarian.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young Yeti on the roof of her apartment building, she and her friends embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family.

programme.title: How The Grinch Stole Christmas

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When a cute alien lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own race, he forms an unlikely friendship with a brave little girl who's on a quest of her own.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Dracula hosts a birthday celebration for his daughter with all his monster friends, but the party is turned upside down when a human unexpectedly arrives and changes everything.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck rocker takes a modest teaching job at a strict school. His antics inspire the kids to form a killer band that could solve his money troubles and get him back in the spotlight.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Eight years after a strange incident at a dinosaur theme park, a paleontologist is approached by a wealthy couple who offer him a big sum to fly over a notorious island, but things soon turn dangerous.

programme.title: Thunderbirds
programme.desc: The world's greatest rescue squad are trapped in space while an evil enemy works overtime.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Dolittle
programme.desc: When a young queen falls seriously ill, Dr. Dolittle sets out on an epic journey to a mythical island to find a cure, rediscovering his courage and old skills along the way with the help of new companions.

programme.title: Shrek The Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Puss In Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with a family vacation on a monster cruise ship. Whilst enjoying their time, the unexpected happens when Drac falls for the dangerous Captain of the ship.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: Briar, Bramble and their friend Vick go on an accidental journey into the primitive age. Searching for the way back to the 21st century, they encounter all kinds of dangers and exotic animals.

programme.title: The Bad Guys
programme.desc: The Bad Guys are the most notorious criminals in the world, pulling off a lifetime of legendary heists, but can the gang of misfits pull off their biggest job yet - going good?

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king, and Shrek and Fiona have never met. He must undo all he's done to save his world.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.desc: Gentle farmer Arthur Hoggett wins a piglet Babe at a county fair. Narrowly escaping his fate as Christmas dinner, Babe bonds with motherly border collie Fly and discovers that he too can herd sheep.

programme.desc: Sonic The Hedgehog accidentally sparks the attention of super-uncool evil genius Dr. Robotnik. Now it's super-villain vs super-sonic in a race to stop Robotnik from taking over the world.

programme.desc: The bass guitarist of a country music band is electrocuted during a concert. He recovers with partial memory loss which helps begin the CSIs investigation into possible sabotage.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The body of a 14-year-old boy is discovered in a field and the investigation reveals the victim has blood under his fingernails that matches a convicted killer who is in prison for murdering his wife.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Detective Vartann and Catherine pose as a couple during a stakeout on a drug operation while Langston and Nick work on a case involving a woman's death linked to a fetish club.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston investigates the murder of a family and thinks he's finally found a suspect for Dr Jekyll. But all is not what it seems.

programme.title: A Little Chaos
programme.desc: A romantic drama following Sabine (Academy Award®-winner Kate Winslet), a strong-willed and talented landscape designer, who is chosen to build one of the main gardens at King Louis XIV's new palace at Versailles. In her new position of power, she challenges gender and class barriers while also becoming professionally and romantically entangled with the court's renowned landscape artist André Le Notre (Matthias Schoenaerts).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: On a Clear Day
programme.desc: Frank is a hard-working 55 year-old, respected in his local community, who suddenly finds himself without a job. For the first time in his life, Frank is without direction. When his friend Danny jokes that on a clear day he could swim to France, an idea is planted in Frank’s mind. Concealing his plans from his loving wife Joan Frank is determined to put his life back together by attempting the ultimate test of endurance – to swim the English Channel. In doing so he cements a broken relationship with his grown-up son.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Interlude in Prague
programme.desc: A powerful period thriller, starring James Purefoy (High-Rise), Samantha Barks (Les Misérables) and Aneurin Barnard (Dunkirk).1788, Mozart escapes Vienna to spend time in Prague. His presence unleashes a series of dramatic events set off by a forbidden affair with soprano Zuzana. A provocative twist on the Mozart biopic, with love, lust, murder and "Don Giovanni" - not your average costume drama!
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: AmStarDam
programme.desc: Combining classic fairytales with the wild world of Amsterdam, this riotous Lennox Brother's fantasy comedy is a coming of age story not for the faint hearted. Jack arrives in Amsterdam to find his father and through a momentary magical encounter, finds the secret weapon that could turn around his father's ailing marijuana coffee shop.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: A Medieval 'Magnificent Seven', that combines the visceral, stylized action of '300' with the impassioned heroism and romance of 'Braveheart'. Starring James Purefoy (Solomon Kane), Brian Cox (The Bourne Supremacy), and Paul Giamatti (Shoot 'Em Up), IRONCLAD is an ultra-violent action thriller that tells the true story of a motley crew of tough, battle hardened warriors, who withstood several brutal and bloody months under siege, in a desperate bid to defend their country's freedom...
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ironclad: Battle for Blood
programme.desc: It's 1216, just one year after the battle at Rochester Castle, and a new enemy threatens English - bands of Celtic raiders. After the death of his father at the hands of these raiders, Hubert is determined to defeat them, once and for all.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: Two miles west of London, Dr. Robert Laing moves into his new apartment seeking soulless anonymity, only to find that the building's residents have no intention of leaving him alone. Resigned to the complex social dynamics unfolding around him, Laing bites the bullet and becomes neighbourly. As he struggles to establish his position, Laing's good manners and sanity.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: On a Clear Day
programme.desc: Frank is a hard-working 55 year-old, respected in his local community, who suddenly finds himself without a job. For the first time in his life, Frank is without direction. When his friend Danny jokes that on a clear day he could swim to France, an idea is planted in Frank’s mind. Concealing his plans from his loving wife Joan Frank is determined to put his life back together by attempting the ultimate test of endurance – to swim the English Channel. In doing so he cements a broken relationship with his grown-up son.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: White Riot
programme.desc: Rubika Shah’s energising film charts a vital national protest movement. Rock Against Racism (RAR) was formed in 1976, prompted by ‘music’s biggest colonialist’ Eric Clapton and his support of racist MP Enoch Powell. White Riot blends fresh interviews with queasy archive footage to recreate a hostile environment of anti-immigrant hysteria and National Front marches. As neo-Nazis recruited the nation’s youth, RAR’s multicultural punk and reggae gigs provided rallying points for resistance. As founder Red Saunders explains: ‘We peeled away the Union Jack to reveal the swastika’. The campaign grew from Hoxton fanzine roots to 1978’s huge antifascist carnival in Victoria Park, featuring X-Ray Spex, Steel Pulse and of course The Clash, whose rock star charisma and gale-force conviction took RAR’s message to the masses.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Interlude in Prague
programme.desc: A powerful period thriller, starring James Purefoy (High-Rise), Samantha Barks (Les Misérables) and Aneurin Barnard (Dunkirk).1788, Mozart escapes Vienna to spend time in Prague. His presence unleashes a series of dramatic events set off by a forbidden affair with soprano Zuzana. A provocative twist on the Mozart biopic, with love, lust, murder and "Don Giovanni" - not your average costume drama!
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Cheerful Weather for the Wedding
programme.desc: On a crisp December morning in 1932, bride-to-be Dolly hides in her bedroom as her many family members arrive for the wedding with all the cheerfulness, chaos and grievances that go with such occasions. But trouble soon appears with the arrival of Joseph, Dolly’s lover from the previous summer, who, to her mother’s exasperation, throws Dolly’s feelings into turmoil.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady, starring Meryl Streep, tells the compelling story of Margaret Thatcher, a woman who smashed through the barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world. The story concerns power and the price that is paid for power, and is a surprising and intimate portrait of an extraordinary and complex woman.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ironclad: Battle for Blood
programme.desc: It's 1216, just one year after the battle at Rochester Castle, and a new enemy threatens English - bands of Celtic raiders. After the death of his father at the hands of these raiders, Hubert is determined to defeat them, once and for all.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: Bill Nighy is Victor Maynard, a middle-aged, solitary assassin, who lives to please his formidable mother, Louisa (Eileen Atkins), despite his own peerless reputation for lethal efficiency. His professional routine is interrupted when he finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims, Rose (Emily Blunt). He spares her life, unexpectedly acquiring a young apprentice in the process, Tony (Rupert Grint). Believing Victor to be a private detective, his two new companions tag along, while he attempts to thwart the murderous attentions of his unhappy client (Rupert Everett).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Attack The Block
programme.desc: Cult sci-fi comedy starring Jodie Whittaker, John Boyega, Nick Frost and Luke Treadaway. Bonfire night, South London. Sam, a trainee nurse, is making her way home when she's accosted by a gang of hooded teenage thugs demanding her wallet and phone. That is until a huge, flaming meteorite crash-lands into a nearby car. Sam makes her escape while the gang find themselves confronted by a rabid, ravenous extra-terrestrial with a craving for human flesh. Having killed the creature they soon realise that this is only the beginning. There are other aliens invading the earth and they're bigger, stronger and hungrier. Their only chance of survival is to take refuge within the concrete walls of their housing estate block. Teaming up with their initial victim Sam and local dealer Ron, the neighbourhood's biggest threat soon realise they could be the block's only hope. It's inner city versus outer space and it's about to get nasty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: On Chesil Beach
programme.desc: Adapted by Ian McEwan from his bestselling novel, the drama centers on a young couple of drastically different backgrounds in the summer of 1962. Following the pair through their idyllic courtship, this movie explores sex and the societal pressure that can accompany physical intimacy, leading to an awkward and fateful wedding night.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Alone in Berlin
programme.desc: How did an ordinary, middle-aged couple become a symbol of defiance against Nazi brutality? This true-life tale of courage unfolds against the tumultuous backdrop of Berlin in 1940. Otto and Anna Quangel (Brendan Gleeson & Emma Thompson) are a working class husband and wife doing their best to ride out the war. When their son is killed fighting on the frontlines, however, everything changes. They begin pouring their rage and grief into postcards emblazoned with anti-Nazi slogans, risking everything to disseminate their messages of protest across the city. But this seemingly small act of subversion rattles the regime, including a police inspector (Daniel Brühl) who will not rest until the culprits have been caught. Based on the bestselling novel Every Man Dies Alone by Hans Fallada, Alone in Berlin is both a gripping thriller and a stirring ode to resistance.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mad About the Boy: The Noël Coward Story
programme.desc: The extraordinary life of playwright, singer, actor, composer, and director Noël Coward, who rose from poverty to stardom while keeping his sexuality a secret. Featuring Laurence Olivier, Maggie Smith, Frank Sinatra, Michael Caine and Lucille Ball. Narrated by Alan Cumming. With Rupert Everett as the voice of Noël Coward. Directed by Academy Award Nominee Barnaby Thompson.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: In 1967, three generations of spirited friends from Dublin chase miracles on a pilgrimage to Lourdes — and navigate unexpected revelations along the way.

programme.title: A Promise
programme.desc: Set against the outbreak of World War I, 'A Promise' centres on Lotte Hoffmeister (Rebecca Hall of 'The Awakening') a married woman who falls in love with her husband’s protégé, Friedrich Zeitz (Richard Madden of 'Game of Thrones'). Bound by duty and divided by the impending war, the young lovers pledge their devotion to each other in spite of what their future holds. Adapted from Stefan Zweig’s novel 'Journey into the Past' and directed by Patrice Leconte ('The Girl on the Bridge', 'Man on the Train'), 'A Promise' is a passionate and romantic drama about forbidden love.

programme.title: Neds
programme.desc: From acclaimed Director Peter Mullan comes NEDS, the story of a young man’s journey from prize winning schoolboy to knife carrying teenager. John McGill (an amazing performance from newcomer Conor McCarron) struggles with the low expectations of those around him and events take a maddening turn as he descends into shocking violence on a seemingly one man mission of self destruction.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Attack The Block
programme.desc: Cult sci-fi comedy starring Jodie Whittaker, John Boyega, Nick Frost and Luke Treadaway. Bonfire night, South London. Sam, a trainee nurse, is making her way home when she's accosted by a gang of hooded teenage thugs demanding her wallet and phone. That is until a huge, flaming meteorite crash-lands into a nearby car. Sam makes her escape while the gang find themselves confronted by a rabid, ravenous extra-terrestrial with a craving for human flesh. Having killed the creature they soon realise that this is only the beginning. There are other aliens invading the earth and they're bigger, stronger and hungrier. Their only chance of survival is to take refuge within the concrete walls of their housing estate block. Teaming up with their initial victim Sam and local dealer Ron, the neighbourhood's biggest threat soon realise they could be the block's only hope. It's inner city versus outer space and it's about to get nasty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: This is the story of the 1960s pop culture explosion, seen through the eyes of the British film legend Michael Caine. Caine himself narrates and appears in the film alongside The Beatles, Twiggy, Mary Quant, The Rolling Stones, and many other iconic names.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: In 1967, three generations of spirited friends from Dublin chase miracles on a pilgrimage to Lourdes — and navigate unexpected revelations along the way.

programme.title: A Promise
programme.desc: Set against the outbreak of World War I, 'A Promise' centres on Lotte Hoffmeister (Rebecca Hall of 'The Awakening') a married woman who falls in love with her husband’s protégé, Friedrich Zeitz (Richard Madden of 'Game of Thrones'). Bound by duty and divided by the impending war, the young lovers pledge their devotion to each other in spite of what their future holds. Adapted from Stefan Zweig’s novel 'Journey into the Past' and directed by Patrice Leconte ('The Girl on the Bridge', 'Man on the Train'), 'A Promise' is a passionate and romantic drama about forbidden love.

programme.title: The Gospel of Us
programme.desc: This project is the film version of the Passion play that was performed throughout Port Talbot in Easter 2011.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: Academy Award® nominee Ian McKellen takes on the iconic role of Detective Sherlock Holmes in this exciting new twist on the world’s most famous detective. In 1947, the world famous sleuth has retired to a remote Sussex farmhouse, living in relative anonymity with only his housekeeper Mrs Munro and her young son, Roger, for company. Grappling with the diminishing powers of his mind — and frustrated with the misrepresentation of him in Watson’s best-selling novels — he diverts his attention to an unsolved case. As the mystery deepens, Sherlock tries desperately to recall the events of 30 years ago that ultimately led to his retirement.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Lady Rose (Vanessa Redgrave) is an elderly woman who has lived in a hospital for over 50 years. Despite her bleak surroundings there is a light in her eyes that cannot be extinguished. Dr. Stephen Grene (Eric Bana) is drawn to her, compelled to discover her past and help gain her freedom. Through Lady Rose's 'scripture', a life of extraordinary love and great injustice emerges, revealing a remarkable young woman of courage, whose only crime was to fall in love.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a world renowned antiques expert. One day he receives a phone call from the mysterious Claire who asks him to evaluate some family works of art. It will be the beginning of a relationship that will change his life forever.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The extraordinary and epic true story of Eric Lomax, a British Army officer who is tormented as a prisoner of war at a Japanese labour camp during World War II. Decades later, Lomax and his beautiful love interest, Patti, discover that the Japanese interpreter responsible for much of his treatment is still alive. They set out to confront him, and Eric's haunting past, in this powerful and inspiring tale of heroism, humanity and the redeeming power of love.

programme.title: Slumber
programme.desc: Alice, a sleep doctor haunted by the mysterious death of her younger brother, must abandon all her rational scientific reasoning when she comes across a family terrorized by a demon that feeds on its victims by paralyzing them while they sleep. In order to defeat the dark spirit who was also responsible for her brother’s death, Alice must journey into her own nightmares.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Gospel of Us
programme.desc: This project is the film version of the Passion play that was performed throughout Port Talbot in Easter 2011.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: Academy Award® nominee Ian McKellen takes on the iconic role of Detective Sherlock Holmes in this exciting new twist on the world’s most famous detective. In 1947, the world famous sleuth has retired to a remote Sussex farmhouse, living in relative anonymity with only his housekeeper Mrs Munro and her young son, Roger, for company. As the mystery deepens, Sherlock tries desperately to recall the events of 30 years ago that ultimately led to his retirement.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: To Olivia
programme.desc: In 1962, writer Roald Dahl and his movie star wife Patricia Neal have retreated to the English countryside to bring up their young family. Tragically, their lives are turned upside down by the death of their daughter, Olivia. As the couple struggle through the loss, their grief becomes a source of redemption and strength which changes their destiny.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: A Guide To Second Date Sex
programme.desc: How bad can a second date be? United by a love for Meryl Streep and hopeless relationships, one pair are about to find out. Comedy with Alexandra Roach and George MacKay.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The extraordinary and epic true story of Eric Lomax, a British Army officer who is tormented as a prisoner of war at a Japanese labour camp during World War II. Decades later, Lomax and his beautiful love interest, Patti, discover that the Japanese interpreter responsible for much of his treatment is still alive. They set out to confront him, and Eric's haunting past, in this powerful and inspiring tale of heroism, humanity and the redeeming power of love.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A funeral in which the dead is anything but the protagonist. The deceased is Daniel's father. He lives with his mother and girlfriend at the family house, and is in charge of organizing the event and paying for the expenses. To say goodbye to this kind man, apart from a coffin with the wrong body, a series of outrageous characters arrives: a brother-in-law on an acid trip, Daniel's hypochondriac friend who has perfect timing for making the most importunate comments, a prodigious but stingy son who lives in a New York, and a dwarf who claims part of the fortune.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug (David Tennant) and Abi (Rosamund Pike) and their three children travel to the Scottish Highlands for Doug's father Gordie's (Billy Connolly) birthday party. It's soon clear that when it comes to keeping a secret under wraps from the rest of the family, their children are their biggest liability…
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: David Bowie went to America for the first time to promote his third album, The Man Who Sold the World. There, he embarked on a coast-to-coast publicity tour. During this tour, Bowie came up with the idea of his iconic Ziggy Stardust character, inspired by artists like Iggy Pop and Lou Reed.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Into the White
programme.desc: Norway, WWII. A group of British and German soldiers find themselves stranded in the wild after an aircraft battle. Finding shelter in the same cabin, they realise there is only one way to survive.

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: An elderly retired marine takes the law into his own hands when his friend is murdered by hoodlums on a London estate.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Operation Mincemeat
programme.desc: It’s 1943. The Allies are determined to break Hitler’s grip on occupied Europe, and plan to launch an all-out assault on Sicily; but they face an impossible challenge - how to protect the invasion force from potential annihilation. It falls to two remarkable intelligence officers, Ewen Montagu (Colin Firth) and Charles Cholmondeley (Matthew Macfadyen) to dream the most inspired and improbable disinformation strategy of the war - centred on the most unlikely of secret agents: a dead man. Operation Mincemeat is the extraordinary and true story of an idea that hoped to turn the tide for the Allies - taking impossibly high risks, defying logic, and testing the nerves of its creators to breaking point.

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: From the team behind Sexy Beast comes this potent exploration of the masculine ego at break point, set against the seedy back drop of London's gangster underbelly. Colin Diamond (Ray Winstone) is in agony. Shattered by the bombshell of his wife's (Joanne Whalley) infidelity with a young French waiter. His motley crew of friends– Old Man Peanut (John Hurt), Meredith (Ian McShane), Archie (Tom Wilkinson), and Mal (Stephen Dillane) – kidnap Loverboy, and assemble a kangaroo court so that Colin can restore his manhood with revenge. Loverboy's life is now at stake as Colin wrestles with heartbreak, anger, madness, love andself pity.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Pin Cushion
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, socially awkward Iona and her cat-obsessed mother Lyn move to a new town. Together the pair put on a brave face, finding and creating comfort as one another’s sole friend. However, life begins to get tricky after the town’s small-minded denizens reveal themselves to be as petty and cruel as those from the town they just fled. At school, Iona finds herself targeted by a trio of mean girls who exploit her naïveté. Across town, Lyn attempts to make friends and is flatly rejected by a knitting circle of mean women who find her very existence repugnant. Daughter and mother find refuge in an elaborate fantasy world founded on denial and delusion; ultimately distance between them just when they need each other most.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug (David Tennant) and Abi (Rosamund Pike) and their three children travel to the Scottish Highlands for Doug's father Gordie's (Billy Connolly) birthday party. programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: Psychology professor Phillip Goodman receives a letter from his mentor, Charles Cameron, a parapsychologist who went missing 15 years before and has been presumed to be dead.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Chéri
programme.desc: In this superb drama set in pre-World War I Paris, an ageing courtesan has an ill-fated love affair with the son of her rival.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: Rachel Weisz stars as Hester Collyer, who leads a privileged life in 1950's London as the beautiful wife of high court judge Sir William Collyer (Simon Russell Beale). To the shock of those around her, she walks out on her marriage to move in with dashing young ex-RAF pilot, Freddie Page (Tom Hiddleston), with whom she has fallen passionately in love. Set in post-war Britain, THE DEEP BLUE SEA is a study of forbidden love, suppressed desire, and the fear of loneliness but is at heart a deeply moving love story. Stuck between the devil and the deep blue sea, what - or whom - should Hester choose?
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady, starring Meryl Streep, tells the compelling story of Margaret Thatcher, a woman who smashed through the barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world. The story concerns power and the price that is paid for power, and is a surprising and intimate portrait of an extraordinary and complex woman.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Nothing Like a Dame
programme.desc: From time to time four old friends, all extraordinary actresses, meet up in the English countryside to gossip, to remember and to laugh. For once they let the cameras in... Nothing Like A Dame is a unique celebration of the lives and careers of four of our most iconic actresses: Dame Eileen Atkins, Dame Judi Dench, Dame Joan Plowright and Dame Maggie Smith. All four have gone from being fledgling actresses in the 1950s to acting royalty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Winston Churchill: Walking with Destiny
programme.desc: The life and work of the British Prime Minister during his early opposition to the Nazis and his support of the Jews.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: Tensions mount for the beleaguered British Prime Minister Winston Churchill (Brian Cox) in the days leading up to infamous Allied D-Day landings in Normandy, France in June, 1944. Fearful of repeating his deadly mistakes from World War I in the Battle of Gallipoli, exhausted by years of war, plagued by depression and obsessed with his historical destiny, Churchill is reluctant to embark on the large-scale campaign, one that the entire war effort hinges upon. Clashing with his Allied political opponents U.S. General Dwight D. Eisenhower (John Slattery) and British Field Marshal Bernard Law Montgomery (Julian Wadham), the troubled Churchill receives support and devotion from his wife, the brilliant and unflappable Clementine Churchill (Miranda Richardson). With her strength and shrewdness, “Clemmie” halts Winston’s physical, mental spiritual collapse and inspires him on to greatness.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: Absolutely Anything will follow a disillusioned school teacher, Neil Clarke (Pegg) who suddenly finds he has the ability to do anything he wishes, a challenge bestowed upon him by a group of power-crazed aliens (voiced by Cleese, Gilliam, Jones, Palin & Idle), watching him from space. As he struggles to deal with these new found powers and the events that subsequently arise, he calls upon his loyal canine companion Dennis (voiced by Robin Williams) to help him along the way.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Route Irish
programme.desc: Fergus returns to his native Liverpool for the funeral of his childhood friend Frankie, a fellow private security contractor who has been killed on "Route Irish", the deadly and now infamous stretch of road between Baghdad airport and the Green Zone. Refusing to accept the official account of his best friend's death, Fergus launches his own investigation, fuelled by the discovery of a cell phone on which Frankie had recorded the shooting of an innocent Iraqi family just days before his own death. As his investigation ramps up - via frequent skype conversations with former security colleagues in Iraq and his interrogation of security firm officials in the UK - Fergus soon draws the heat of those he is investigating and a once dirty foreign war is transferred to the streets of Liverpool and pursued on home turf.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Chéri
programme.desc: In this superb drama set in pre-World War I Paris, an ageing courtesan has an ill-fated love affair with the son of her rival.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.desc: Frank Drebin, the idiot detective, uncovers a plot by super villain Robert Goulet to sabotage the USA's energy policy. More slapstick mayhem in the first sequel to the comedy classic.

programme.desc: A vet targets a disaster-prone St Bernard for animal experimentation, and it's up to his family to save the cuddly canine.

programme.desc: A teenager moves with his mum from New Jersey to California and struggles to fit in. After clashing with a local group led by a confident rival, he decides to learn karate to defend himself and build confidence.

programme.desc: In a future world devastated by disease, a convict is sent back in time to gather information about the man-made virus that wiped out most of the human population.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.desc: Barely escaping a raging Shanghai nightclub brawl, Indy crash-lands into the wilds of India where he uncovers a sinister scheme that has enslaved a remote village's children in a fortress-like mine.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a team of misfits so they'll lose and she can move them to Miami. When they uncover the plot, they decide to teach her a lesson and start winning.

programme.desc: In the far future, in a time of way out, psychedelic spaceships and free love. Space agent Barbarella is assigned stopping the evil Durand-Durand and saving humanity.

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: You'll never guess who's going to have a baby. Watch as the maternal tables are turned forever when, after taking an experimental drug, a male scientist becomes pregnant.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: A tough cop is given his most difficult assignment: masquerade as a kindergarten teacher in order to find a drug dealer.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Wealthy hunters pay for the right to stalk and kill the most challenging prey of them all: Man.
